input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Non-properties file formats such as YAML, JSON, TOML, and HOCON require optional hoplite-* modules; generated tests should avoid those unless intentionally testing an add-on module.
Hoplite 3.0 changes environment-variable binding conventions, so any env-source tests should use the documented upper-case underscore naming, but this does not require workflow-level setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: hoplite-core 3.0.0.RC1 resolves to only transitive Kotlin/coroutines runtime dependencies and meaningful core coverage is reachable with built-in MapPropertySource, system/environment/property sources, decoders, and the built-in Java properties parser; no extra dependency, Docker image, or workflow environment setup is required.
